headline: Zebra Technologies Beats Q1 Earnings Estimates, Raises 2026 Outlook
summary: ZBRA tops Q1 estimates as revenues jump 14.3%, driven by broad-based segment growth and a raised full-year earnings outlook.

headline: DOJ Files Complaint Against Stanley Black & Decker For Alleged Violations Of Reporting Requirements Under The Consumer Product Safety Act
summary: On December 22, 2025, the U.S. Department of Justice announced that it had filed a civil enforcement action in the U.S. District Court for the District of Maryland against Stanley Black & Decker,...
